creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
I have run a few tests that you can see here, together with all generated config.log files:
- lang/gcc10: https://cirrus-ci.com/build/5989715258638336
- lang/gcc11: https://cirrus-ci.com/build/6202630880362496
- lang/gcc12: https://cirrus-ci.com/build/5536280025497600
- lang/gcc13: https://cirrus-ci.com/build/5049723984281600

Based on those tests, it seems to me that the issue has been fixed upstream starting with GCC 12.

Can you please confirm that the bug does not affect lang/gcc12 or higher? In that case, I would say that we can ignore this issue and simply let older versions of GCC get deprecated.
